_schema: One JSON object per line — the growth agent's structured engagement-experiment log (append-only). Fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD), rubric_lever (e.g. R1), hypothesis (one line), files (list of prompt files changed), commit (sha), predicted ({metric, dir:up|down}), baseline_note (measured baseline at ship time), status (running|measuring|promoted|reverted), verdict (null until settled). The agent skips any line containing _schema.
note: Seed line. Real experiments are appended below by the daily run.

hypothesis: Thumbnail hooks that stop echoing the title and instead open a curiosity gap (withhold the resolution, no title words) will raise CTR once impressions flow.
baseline_note: Render-and-judge: 9/12 golden-set hooks reused the title's distinctive words (ch2-code hook 'Um Servidor Para Tudo' a literal title slice; ch1-code '5 Lines Fix Slow RAG'). After change, title-echo ~1/12 with genuine gaps; both gated renders visible=True/no-fallback, verify_storyboard 38/38.
